overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character web-swinging through a snowy Manhattan skyline on a clear winter day. The character traverses from high-altitude aerial swinging down to street level, then wall-runs up a skyscraper to climb the antenna spire.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude aerial traversal between Manhattan skyscrapers

events.description: character performs a steep dive descent from high altitude towards street level
lands briefly on a snowy rooftop before jumping off to continue swinging

agents.ego_description: web-swinging acrobatically between skyscrapers at high altitude, performing dives and aerial maneuvers through the city canyons

entered.detail: iconic art deco skyscraper with distinctive spire visible in the distance, serving as the traversal target
modern glass curtain wall skyscraper reflecting the blue sky
white snow blanketing the building rooftops throughout the cityscape
mid-rise yellow brick apartment building with fire escapes
classic wooden water tower on rooftop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-altitude web-swinging through a snowy Manhattan skyline on a clear winter day. The Empire State Building stands prominently in the distance as the character performs acrobatic aerial maneuvers between skyscrapers, diving down toward street level before briefly landing on a rooftop.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-level urban canyon with street traffic visible below

events.description: swings directly through a flock of pigeons causing them to scatter
transitions from horizontal swinging to vertical wall-running up a building facade

agents.ego_description: descending to mid-level altitude, swinging through the urban canyon and passing through a flock of pigeons in flight

notable_agents.action: flock of pigeons taking flight and scattering as the character swings past them

entered.detail: large commercial advertisement billboard mounted on building side
cars and taxis moving along the snow-lined streets visible from above
group of birds in flight near the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character descends to mid-level altitude, swinging between buildings with the street visible below. A flock of pigeons scatters as the character swings past, and the Empire State Building grows larger in the center of the frame as the approach continues.

events.description: transitions from wall-running to climbing the architectural setbacks of the building
reaches the upper crown of the building with the antenna spire becoming visible

agents.ego_description: running vertically up the glass and stone facade of the skyscraper, using window ledges and architectural details for grip while ascending rapidly

entered.detail: grid of reflective glass windows on the skyscraper facade passing by at close range
stepped art deco architectural details and cornices on the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to vertical traversal, wall-running up the glass facade of the Empire State Building. The camera follows the rapid ascent past rows of windows and architectural setbacks, with the street level falling away below and the building's crown approaching.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper spire and antenna structure at roof level

events.description: reaches the main roof and begins climbing the exposed metal antenna framework

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal antenna spire at the summit of the skyscraper, ascending the final structure toward the peak

entered.detail: exposed metal framework and lattice tower rising from the building crown
radio and television transmission equipment mounted on the spire
bright sun creating lens flare as the character reaches the highest altitude

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character reaching the summit of the skyscraper and climbing the exposed metal antenna spire. The camera looks up at the metal framework against the bright blue sky, with the sun flaring as the character ascends the final structure to the building's peak.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-altitude aerial traversal of a snowy Manhattan skyline to a vertical ascent up a skyscraper's spire. It begins with acrobatic web-swinging between skyscrapers on a clear winter day, diving from the heights toward the city streets with the Empire State Building standing prominently in the distance. As the character descends to mid-level altitude, the camera captures a flock of pigeons scattering while the Empire State Building grows larger and more central in the frame. The scene then shifts to a rapid vertical climb, wall-running up the glass facade and architectural setbacks of the building as the street level falls away below. Finally, the camera looks upward against a bright blue sky, following the ascent up the exposed metal antenna spire as the sun flares at the building's peak.
